title: UK economy grew 0.5% in February, beating economists' expectations by a long shot
summary_full: Economists polled by Reuters expected U.K. gross domestic product (GDP) to have expanded by 0.1% month-on-month.
summary_public: Economists polled by Reuters expected U.K. gross domestic product (GDP) to have expanded by 0.1% month-on-month.
